description: Enable bcWebCam's keyboard emulation (wedge) output mode so that scanned barcode data is automatically sent as simulated keystrokes to the focused application. Also, set the inter-keystroke delay to exactly 20 milliseconds. Open bcWebCam's Options/Settings dialog (gear icon), navigate to the Output or Keyboard section, enable the keyboard emulation option, set the delay to 20, and click OK/Save to apply.
